rationale: No existing Metrics test covers share/deep-link functionality. The dashboard-share-link.spec.js covers dashboard sharing (analogous pattern) but it's a separate area. The MetricsPage page object (2357 lines) has no share button methods, clipboard helpers, or URL blob validation — all must be added. This is a greenfield feature for Metrics E2E coverage. Playwright config auto-discovers tests from the testDir directory; no explicit registration needed.
